mapper.select: SELECT PD.LOCATION_ID , P.PRODUCT_ID , P.CATEGORY_ID , L.LOCATION_NM , C.CATEGORY_NM , P.PRODUCT_NM , D.PAYMENT_TYPE , D.SALES_TYPE , SUM(D.QTY) QTY , SUM(D.SALES_PRICE)/SUM(D.QTY) INPUT_SALES_PRICE , SUM(D.SALES_PRICE) SALES_PRICE , MAX(P.ORG_SALES_PRICE) ORG_SALES_PRICE , MAX(D.DESCRIPTION) DESCRIPTION , 'N' EDITOR , (SELECT MAX(NAME) NAME FROM user_mst WHERE USER_ID = (CASE WHEN D.UPDATE_USER IS NOT NULL THEN D.UPDATE_USER ELSE D.CREATE_USER END) ) UPDATE_USER , CASE WHEN P.UPDATE_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN DATE_FORMAT(D.UPDATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(D.CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') END UPDATE_DATE FROM sales_dtl D LEFT JOIN product_mst P ON D.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN category_mst C ON P.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN product_dtl PD ON D.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = PD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID LEFT JOIN store_location_mst L ON PD.LOCATION_ID = L.LOCATION_ID WHERE D.SALES_ID = #{salesId} GROUP BY PD.LOCATION_ID , P.PRODUCT_ID , P.CATEGORY_ID , L.LOCATION_NM , C.CATEGORY_NM , P.PRODUCT_NM , D.PAYMENT_TYPE , D.SALES_TYPE ORDER BY P.PRODUCT_ID

SELECT L.PRODUCT_DTL_ID , L.LOT_NO , P.PRODUCT_NM , L.PRODUCT_ID , L.RECEIVED_DATE , L.ORG_STOCK_QTY , IFNULL(SUM(SD.QTY),0) AS SOLD_QTY , (L.ORG_STOCK_QTY - IFNULL(SUM(SD.QTY),0)) AS AVAILABLE_QTY FROM product_dtl L LEFT JOIN sales_dtl SD ON L.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID LEFT JOIN product_mst P ON L.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID WHERE L.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND L.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND L.EXPIRATION_DATE >= CURDATE() GROUP BY L.PRODUCT_DTL_ID HAVING AVAILABLE_QTY > 0 ORDER BY L.EXPIRATION_DATE ASC, L.RECEIVED_DATE ASC FOR UPDATE
